projects.title: e-waste Registry BD (World Bank Funded)
projects.description: Bangladesh's comprehensive platform for electronic waste management. Connecting producers, importers, collectors, and recyclers to create a circular economy for electronic products.

projects.title: Learning Management System (LMS)
projects.description: Developed a training platform for the sales force, enabling employees to complete assigned courses within a defined timeline, take exams, and automatically generate certificates. The platform also includes additional functionalities.

projects.title: FinCoachBD
projects.description: Apply Instantly for Loan, SME Loan & Credit Card from Anywhere to Your Desired Bangladeshi Bank Anytime.

projects.title: Electronics Tracking Activity (eTRAC)
projects.description: A web application and automation system designed to manage conference activities and coordinate with doctors and organizations for business-related topics.

projects.title: Electronics Purchase Requisition Management (ePRM)
projects.description: ePRM is a web application for managing purchase requisitions, featuring auto-generated approvers and structured approval workflows.

projects.title: Expensya
projects.description: Expensya is a web-based application for claiming daily expenses of a company's field workers through a structured system with an approval workflow.

projects.title: FinPac
projects.description: FinPac is a centralized web-based ERP application which includes Financial Accounting, Asset Accounting, Procurement & Purchase, Inventory/Material Management, Sales and Distribution and Management Accounting modules.
